title: Fluorescence lifetime imaging and reflectance confocal microscopy for multiscale imaging of oral precancer.
author: Jabbour JM Cheng S Malik BH Cuenca R Jo JA Wright J Cheng YS Maitland KC
content: S-EPMC3628018 PMC3628018 Fluorescence lifetime imaging and reflectance confocal microscopy for multiscale imaging of oral precancer. Optical imaging techniques using a variety of contrast mechanisms are under evaluation for early detection of epithelial precancer; however, tradeoffs in field
